changeSet.author: MARKETING
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE oauth_accounts ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id BIGINT NOT NULL, provider VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, access_token VARCHAR(2048) NOT NULL, refresh_token VARCHAR(2048), token_expiry TIMESTAMP, external_user_id VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, granted_scopes VARCHAR(2048), created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), CONSTRAINT fk_oauth_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES USERS(ID), CONSTRAINT uq_oauth_user_provider UNIQUE (user_id, provider) );
